task_type_description: Read-only design doc / artifact under P240D governance simplification rules
source_authorization: Authorize P213B 3_STAR/4_STAR positional data recovery feasibility design (read-only, no DB write)

root_cause_confirmed.description: Both the fetcher and DB layer explicitly sort numbers before storage. Positional order is lost at ingestion time.
root_cause_confirmed.reversibility: Reversible IF the upstream source provides positional order.

confirmed: lottery_api/database.py:463 — explicit sort at DB write
P226 artifact — 100% sorted storage confirmed for 4179 3_STAR and 2922 4_STAR draws
present_uninspected: lottery_api/data/ingest_log.jsonl — present but not inspected; may contain original ingestion method
lottery_api/fetcher/backfill_engine.py — present but not inspected; may sort or not sort
missing: Raw positional backup files for 3_STAR/4_STAR draws
Evidence of Taiwan Lottery API positional order for 3_STAR/4_STAR

source_candidates_found: draws table in lottery_v2.db (sorted only — not useful for positional recovery)
ingest_log.jsonl (uninspected — possible clue to original ingestion method)
source_candidates_missing: Taiwan Lottery API 3_STAR/4_STAR endpoint (unknown if exists or returns positional order)
Historical raw JSON/CSV files with positional draw data
Original import script that populated existing 3_STAR/4_STAR rows

phase_a.name: Read-Only Source Audit
phase_a.description: Inspect backfill_engine.py, ingest_log.jsonl, and confirm Taiwan Lottery API positional order availability.
phase_a.authorization_phrase: Authorize P213C 3_STAR/4_STAR source audit (read-only API inspection, no DB write)

phase_b.name: Schema Design
phase_b.description: Design numbers_positional column addition to draws table and straight-play replay adapter.
phase_b.authorization_phrase: Authorize P213D 3_STAR/4_STAR positional schema design (read-only design doc, no DB write)

phase_c.name: Dry-Run Import
phase_c.description: Dry-run fetch without sorting; compare against existing sorted data; produce diff report.
phase_c.authorization_phrase: Authorize P213E 3_STAR/4_STAR positional dry-run import (no DB write to production DB)

phase_d.name: Production Re-ingestion
phase_d.description: Immutable backup, schema change, backfill positional data, verify row count, drift guard.
phase_d.authorization_phrase: Authorize 3_STAR/4_STAR positional data re-ingestion (DB write authorized, backup confirmed, dry-run passed)

required_future_authorizations: Phase A: Authorize P213C 3_STAR/4_STAR source audit (read-only API inspection, no DB write)
Phase B: Authorize P213D 3_STAR/4_STAR positional schema design (read-only design doc, no DB write)
Phase C: Authorize P213E 3_STAR/4_STAR positional dry-run import (no DB write to production DB)
Phase D: Authorize 3_STAR/4_STAR positional data re-ingestion (DB write authorized, backup confirmed, dry-run passed)
risks: Source data may already be sorted (Taiwan Lottery API may return sorted results)
Digit order ambiguity in API response parsing
Legacy sorted storage in numbers column must not be changed (add new column instead)
Mismatch between raw source and current DB draw IDs
Accidental DB write if Phase C dry-run becomes Phase D without authorization
Straight-play analysis would still be underpowered at current draw counts
mitigations: Phase A source audit confirms before any Phase D commitment
Add numbers_positional column — preserve existing numbers column
Phase C diff report catches discrepancies before Phase D
Explicit separate authorization phrase required for Phase D
All P221F gates required before any straight-play scan
